title: Return Policy
text: Unused gear can be returned within 30 days with a receipt for a full refund. Wetsuits can be returned only if unworn with tags attached. Surfboards are final sale once waxed.

title: Shipping & Delivery
text: Orders over $75 ship free in the continental US. Standard shipping takes 3 to 5 business days. Surfboards ship freight and take 7 to 10 business days.

title: Store Hours & Location
text: We are open 9am to 7pm Monday through Saturday and 10am to 5pm on Sunday. The shop is two blocks from the North Beach pier, with free parking behind the building.

title: Wetsuit Sizing Guide
text: Wetsuit sizes run from XS to XXL and are based on height and chest measurement. If you are between sizes, size down for performance or up for comfort. We offer free in-store fitting.

title: Board Rentals
text: Soft-top rentals are $25 per day or $90 per week, with a valid photo ID held as deposit. Rentals include a leash and a bar of wax. Damage beyond normal wear is billed at repair cost.

title: Repairs & Ding Service
text: We repair dings, cracks, and delamination on most boards. Small ding repairs run $30 to $60 and take about a week. Free estimates at the counter — no appointment needed.
